## Summary

<!-- Explain the problem, solution, and intentionally excluded scope. Link an Issue when applicable. -->

## Validation

<!-- List tests, commands, screenshots, or reproducible evidence. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and independently reviewable.
- [ ] Tests or validation evidence cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and changelog are updated when needed.
- [ ] Compatibility and migration impact are described.
- [ ] Copied or adapted work has source and license attribution.
- [ ] Material AI assistance is disclosed and I verified the result.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal paths, or private data are included.
